RU1.label: Just lost insurance
RU1.noraOpener: Let's get you back on coverage fast. Your plan can be active in 24 hours.
RU1.reinforce: You just got hit. The system failed you. We can have you covered by your start date.
RU1.revealReinforce: You just got hit. Here's what coverage looks like by your start date — no gap.
RU1.comparisonAnchor: what your monthly premium will be once you're back on coverage
RU1.cardScanOffer: Have your old card? 10 seconds to show what stays vs what changes.

SP1.label: Self-employed / 1099
SP1.noraOpener: 37% of self-employed people in your bracket save the most on the right plan. Let me show you what that looks like for you.
SP1.reinforce: You're 1099 — and most freelancers don't realize this kind of plan exists. It was built for self-employed people with irregular income.
SP1.revealReinforce: You're 1099 — and most freelancers don't realize the plan we'd write you was built for them. Here's your real number.
SP1.comparisonAnchor: what most freelancers pay on the open market
SP1.cardScanOffer: Quick one — do you have current insurance you're shopping against?
SP1.socialProofLabel: freelancers got their number this hour

BR1.label: Pre-65 bridge years
BR1.noraOpener: 5+ years from your transition is the costliest stretch. Let's bridge it without the premium spike.
BR1.reinforce: You're in the longest, most expensive insurance gap of your life. The plan we'd write you was designed for exactly this window.
BR1.revealReinforce: The plan we'd write you was designed for exactly this window. Here's what bridging the gap really costs.
BR1.comparisonAnchor: what you'd pay on the open market for bridge coverage
BR1.cardScanOffer: Got your current card? I'll show the bridge math against what you have.

CL1.label: My premium just spiked
CL1.noraOpener: Let me see your current premium and show you the actual delta.
CL1.reinforce: Your renewal letter is real. Most renewals jumped 26–114%. Our number sits 50–60% under what you're being asked to pay now.
CL1.revealReinforce: Your renewal letter is real. Here's what our number looks like next to it — same network, lower premium.
CL1.comparisonAnchor: your renewal premium — the one that just spiked
CL1.cardScanOffer: Want me to read your current card and show what your renewal actually changes?

PC1.label: Check if I'm overpaying
PC1.noraOpener: Worst case: your plan's fine and you saved 60 seconds. Let me run the check.
PC1.reinforce: Most people are. About 6 in 10 we check are paying for things they'll never use.
PC1.revealReinforce: About 6 in 10 we check are paying for things they'll never use. Here's where you actually land.
PC1.comparisonAnchor: whether your current plan is the best deal in your state
PC1.cardScanOffer: Scan your card — I'll check coverage parity for your conditions before we shop.

GEN.label: Not sure
GEN.noraOpener: Let me ask 3 things and tell you which path makes sense.
GEN.reinforce: Most common answer we get. Most people have no idea what they're actually paying for.
GEN.revealReinforce: Most people don't know what they're actually paying for. Here's your real number — and what's hiding behind it.
GEN.comparisonAnchor: the typical premium for someone in your situation
GEN.cardScanOffer: Quick gut-check — do you have current insurance you're shopping against?
